topStories.title: Qatar Airways flies over 7,600 Indians home from Doha in 3 days amid US-Iran war, says embassy
topStories.description: In a March 19 post, Qatar Airways said it would run a limited number of flights until March 28, 2026, citing the ongoing Middle East conflict.

topStories.title: Presumption that women officers had no long career in Armed Forces led to unequal playing field for them: Supreme Court
topStories.description: The Bench headed by CJI Surya Kant upheld permanent commission and consequent pensionary benefits for batches of women officers in the Army, the Air Force and the Navy

topStories.title: Will Iran Agree To US Demands? Israeli Officials Say Unlikely Even As Trump Seems Keen
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump on Monday extended his deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, saying Washington would delay potential strikes on Iranian power plants for another five days.

topStories.title: Puducherry Assembly election 2026: Vijay announces TVK candidates for all 30 seats
topStories.description: TVK president Vijay preparing to contest solo on April 9

topStories.title: New Bill in US Senate Targets Kalshi, Polymarket: Bans Prediction Markets From Sports Bett
topStories.description: This marks the first bipartisan initiative introduced in the Senate aimed at curbing the expansion of sports betting on platforms like Polymarket and Kalshi.

topStories.title: Who is Md Bagher Ghalibaf? Iran's Speaker Likely To Negotiate With Trump
topStories.description: Former IRGC commander, police chief and Tehran mayor, Ghalibaf has emerged as a key power broker amid reports of backchannel US contacts-claims he strongly denies

topStories.title: Supreme Court concludes only Hindus, Sikhs, Buddhists can claim Scheduled Caste status
topStories.description: The Supreme Court found that conversion to any religion not specified in Clause 3 of the 1950 order by a Scheduled Caste member would lead to the loss of the reserved category status

topStories.title: Be prepared for challenges, impact may be long-lasting: PM Modi cautions on US-Iran war in Rajya Sabha
topStories.description: Modi warned of long-term impact due to war, and asked states to act jointly, protect vulnerable groups and curb black marketing.

topStories.title: Tiger Woods stepping back into competitive golf as Masters loom
topStories.description: Tiger Woods will compete for Jupiter Links in the finals of The Golf League on Tuesday night, he said. It will come with the Masters only a few weeks away.

dailyNews.title: Jagdeep Dhankhar was forced to resign as Vice President by Modi govt using ED threat: UBT's Sanjay Raut in book
dailyNews.description: Raut updates English version of his book, ‘Unlikely Paradise’; writes on “actions of Enforcement Directorate (ED) that earned it moniker of a BJP ‘shakha’"

dailyNews.title: Florida Gov Ron DeSantis addresses possible 2028 White House run, wife's breast cancer scare
dailyNews.description: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis says he has not ruled out a 2028 presidential run, claiming he would have won Trump's MAGA base in 2024 if Trump had not run.

dailyNews.title: Flight attendant survives being thrown from Air Canada flight in deadly LaGuardia crash: 'Total miracle'
dailyNews.description: A flight attendant is being called a “miracle" survivor after she was ejected from an Air Canada Jazz flight during a deadly crash at LaGuardia.

dailyNews.title: Rangers pitcher learns he made opening day roster during game
dailyNews.description: Texas Rangers pitcher Carter Baumler learned he was going to make the team's major leaguer roster for opening day during his outing on Monday night.

dailyNews.title: Gov Josh Shapiro admits Dem issues beyond rhetoric, says they failed to deliver to voters
dailyNews.description: Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro argues the Democratic Party's problems go beyond messaging, saying Democrats failed to deliver tangible results and need an internal reckoning.

dailyNews.title: Education Department loses biggest budget item in Trump shutdown push and more top headlines
dailyNews.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.

dailyNews.title: My daughter was killed, and I warned sanctuary city policies would cost lives again
dailyNews.description: A grieving parent who lost his daughter warns that Illinois sanctuary city policies keep costing lives after an 18-year-old college student was killed last week in Chicago.

dailyNews.title: Scammers using AI meet their match as OpenAI, tech industry fight back
dailyNews.description: OpenAI joins the Global Anti-Scam Alliance and launches Scam.org, an AI-powered platform supporting scam victims in over 50 languages worldwide.

dailyNews.title: Stopping GLP-1 drugs like Ozempic erodes heart health benefits quickly, new study finds
dailyNews.description: Stopping GLP-1 drugs like Ozempic quickly erodes heart protection, with two years off the medication raising cardiovascular risk by 22%, a new study finds.

dailyNews.title: 'Americas Counter Cartel Coalition': Inside the US strategy to combat narco terror, confront China, other foes
dailyNews.description: Joseph M. Humire, acting assistant secretary of War for Homeland Defense and Americas Security Affairs, explains the Trump administration's strategy for the Western Hemisphere.

dailyNews.title: Super Bowl champion says brother died by suicide: 'Mental health is real'
dailyNews.description: Tershawn Wharton, a defensive lineman who played for the Kansas City Chiefs and is currently on the Carolina Panthers, announced his brother died by suicide.

dailyNews.title: Warriors' Moses Moody leaves game on stretcher after suffering gruesome injury on dunk attempt
dailyNews.description: Golden State Warriors guard Moses Moody left Monday night's matchup against the Dallas Mavericks with a gruesome leg injury in overtime.

dailyNews.title: Zelenskyy says Ukraine has evidence Russia is aiding Iran with intelligence
dailyNews.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, whose nation has been at war with Russia for years, has indicated that there is evidence that Russia is supplying Iran with intelligence.

dailyNews.description: President Trump postponed his threat to strike power plants in Iran, citing “productive conversations” with the Iranians. But officials said the talks were in an early stage and not substantive.

dailyNews.title: ‘What If Donald Shouts at Me?’ Trump Sours on British Leader Over Iran War
dailyNews.description: President Trump once called Prime Minister Keir Starmer a friend. But Britain’s decision not to join the attacks on Iran has led to merciless mocking by the president.

dailyNews.title: Gregory Bovino’s Final Days: Harsh Words and Few Regrets
dailyNews.description: He was the face of the Trump administration’s immigration crackdown. But as he begins a retirement that was not entirely voluntary, the Border Patrol leader says he did not go far enough.

dailyNews.title: When Trump Wants Something Done, He Dispatches ICE to Do It
dailyNews.description: President Trump has increasingly used Immigration and Customs Enforcement to push personal and political objectives, and on Monday sent agents to airports across the country to help deal with long security lines.

dailyNews.title: 34 Former Military Members Were Put on Deportation Track in the Past Year
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has ramped up enforcement against immigrant service members and their families in its wider crackdown.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court Hears Trump Request to Block Asylum Seekers
dailyNews.description: A policy of turning back many asylum seekers at the border was rescinded in 2021, but the Justice Department wants the flexibility to reinstate it as a tool for border control.

dailyNews.title: Trump, Who Calls Mail-in Voting ‘Cheating,’ Just Voted by Mail
dailyNews.description: President Trump has long fixated on mail-in voting to bolster his baseless claims of widespread voter fraud. But he recently used the method in a Florida special election.

dailyNews.title: Rubio to testify today in criminal trial of ex-congressman, former housemate
dailyNews.description: Former Rep. David Rivera of Florida is accused of secretly lobbying for the Venezuelan government during the first Trump administration.

dailyNews.title: Iran war grinds on amid conflicting messages from Trump and Tehran
dailyNews.description: Trump's optimism about talks to end the Iran war has been tempered by denials from Tehran, and violence that continues to keep the Strait of Hormuz gridlocked.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls off Strait of Hormuz ultimatum as Iran receives U.S. message from mediators
dailyNews.description: As Iran threatens to mine the entire Persian Gulf, President Trump said his deadline for the Strait of Hormuz to reopen is postponed amid negotiations with Tehran.

dailyNews.title: 3/16: Face the Nation
dailyNews.description: This week on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," as the U.S. launches airstrikes on Iran-backed Houthi rebels in Yemen, Margaret Brennan speaks to Secretary of State Marco Rubio. Plus, President Trump's envoy to the Middle East, Steve Witkoff, joins.

dailyNews.title: Trump postpones strikes on Iran's power plants after "productive conversations"
dailyNews.description: Iranian state media said there was no "direct or indirect communication" with President Trump, but a senior Iranian official later indicated they'd received communication from a mediator.

dailyNews.title: DHS funding talks in limbo after Trump insists GOP pass SAVE America Act
dailyNews.description: Senate talks aimed at ending the 38-day DHS shutdown hit a new roadblock after President Trump called on Republicans to hold out for passage of the SAVE America Act.
